extra.reason: Implemented clipboard write failure detection and unprintable control character cleanup. Verified with CGO_ENABLED=0 go test ./src/clipboard.
Added explicit pre-commit bd export --all to .beads/issues.jsonl and verified hook syntax plus export command.

Default tests package no longer imports live API, hotkey, clipboard, or GUI workflows. Manual/debug tests are behind the manual build tag, the interactive GUI validation subtest was removed from default validation, and go test ./tests plus CGO_ENABLED=0 go test ./tests pass. Remaining go test ./... Linux failures are tracked separately as platform package build blockers.
Not planned for current scope. User clarified to ignore Linux full-suite blockers for now and focus on Windows/default tests package hygiene.

Default tests package no longer imports live API, hotkey, clipboard, or interactive GUI workflows. Manual/debug tests are behind the manual build tag, the interactive GUI validation subtest was removed from default validation, go test ./tests passes, and GOOS=windows GOARCH=amd64 go test -c ./tests compiles.
